channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Developers Burn Out Because They’re Treated Like Plug-and-Play Batteries
item.description: Reduce burnout by 60% with system stability — incident frequency, on-call load, and deployment lead time metrics that actually prevent hero culture. Choose automation over slogans.

item.title: How API Security Mistakes Finally Got These 7 Companies Hacked
item.description: 6 companies lost 80M+ records to API flaws like missing rate limits, hardcoded keys, and weak auth checks. Learn the exact mistakes, fixes, and tools to avoid the same fate.

item.title: Why Object Detection Models Fail in Real-World Scenarios
item.description: Boost real-world object detection accuracy by up to 25%. Learn why models fail in production and fix dataset diversity, class imbalance, and environment mismatch.

item.title: SOLID vs STUPID Code: Which Keeps Projects Alive?
item.description: Cut tech debt by 60% using SOLID principles — real-world benchmarks, concrete code examples, and the mistakes that cause STUPID projects to collapse under donor pressure.

item.title: AI Coding Assistants vs Custom AI Agents: Output Gains and Pitfalls
item.description: Cut feature delivery time by 2x using AI: Copilot achieved 3.2 features/engineer vs custom agents at 6.8—with real benchmarks, AWS costs, and fintech lessons from Nairobi to help you choose safely.

item.title: Remote Tech Jobs in 2026: The Only 5 Places That Won’t Screw You Over
item.description: Land remote tech roles in 2026 without job boards: build a newsletter, launch OSS, or host virtual meetups to attract $150K offers—real systems, real outcomes, no fluff.

item.title: Python profiling shows 98% time in 'unknown' with cProfile — here's why
item.description: Cut Python profiling time by 75% after fixing cProfile's '???' bug — learn the three real causes, how to rebuild Python with frame pointers, and how to prevent this in CI. Step-by-step diagnostic guide.

item.title: Python 3.13 in 2026: New syntax, speed, and what you can drop
item.description: Cut API response time by 61% and memory use by 12.5% in Python 3.13: new syntax, new timing API, and dropping legacy packages — benchmarks, fixes, and a deploy-ready example.

item.title: Why AI Fails to Personalize Education (and Fixes)
item.description: Fix AI education personalization failures: reduce churn by 15%, improve lesson relevance by 30%. Diagnose data, feedback loops, and model design issues.

item.title: Supabase in production: how we hit 12ms p99 reads at 10k RPS
item.description: Cut API latency to 12ms p99 at 10k RPS with Supabase — connection pools, RLS indexing, and autovacuum tuning that the docs don’t cover.

item.title: The 9 best tools to build a Second Brain as a developer in 2025
item.description: Cut Second Brain setup time by 60% with Logseq and Git-native tools — plain text, offline search under 0.1s, and a $5/month VPS tier for freelancers and startups

item.title: Free AI Tools That Professionals Actually Use: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Free AI Tools That Professionals Actually Use failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a…

item.title: Automate Your Daily Dev Tasks in 60 Lines of Python
item.description: Automate 45-minute dev tasks in 2 minutes with 60 lines of Python — real benchmarks, CLI flags, and the mistakes that break scripts across teams

item.title: No-code AI data analysis crashes when loading CSV files over 10MB
item.description: Fix silent CSV upload failures with no-code AI tools in under 5 minutes. Stop guessing why 15 MB files fail while 1 MB ones work. Includes Google Drive bypass, Nginx tuning, and chunking scripts for bootstrappers and enterprises.

item.title: Why Figma kept growing when Adobe tried to buy it
item.description: Learn how Figma survived Adobe’s $20B buyout by building a web-first, CRDT-powered design tool with built-in GDPR compliance—cutting onboarding time from hours to minutes and enabling 50 designers on one file.

item.title: The 7 Best Multi-Modal AI Tools in 2024
item.description: Discover the 7 best multi-modal AI tools in 2024. Compare performance, cost, and use cases to find the perfect fit for your project needs.

item.title: 2026 Full-Stack Stack: 40% faster dev cycles with 3x uptime
item.description: es and 99.7% uptime—acceptable for a 2022 with Full-Stack Stack faster dev — weeks of compliance engineering.

item.title: AI skills that paid off: how we built a 6-figure pipeline in 12 months
item.description: Cut model deployment time by 75% and costs by 65% with a hybrid AI pipeline — the real AI skills for 2026 and the tools that made the difference.

item.title: How TypeScript snuck 20% more features into the same sprint
item.description: Cut runtime errors by 94% and boost integration velocity by 89% using TypeScript contracts that define both types and schemas. Includes benchmarks, code examples, and a 312-line codegen tool to sync compile-time and runtime safety.

item.title: API at 1M RPM with $200/month: The stack we chose
item.description: Built an API that handled 1 million requests per minute on a $200 budget using FastAPI, Redis Streams, and SQLite. Cut latency by 90% and saved 14% on costs with a queue-first architecture.
